10.64Stipulated Order for Permanent Injunction and Final Judgment dated January 19, 2017 by and between The Western Union Company and the United States Federal Trade Commission (filed as Exhibit 10.2 to the Company's Current Report on Form 8-K filed on January 20, 2017 and incorporated herein by reference thereto).

10.66Final Order Accepting Monitor's Final Report of the Secondary Recommendations Term and Concluding Matter Issued June 9, 2017 by the Honorable Warren Granville, Maricopa County Superior Court Judge (Filed as Exhibit 10.1 to the Company’s Current Report on Form 8-K filed on June 12, 2017 and incorporated by reference thereto).
